title: Tala Wooden dish brush with Natural Fibres, Long reach washing up brush ideal for Cleaning Kitchen Goods like glasses, plates, pots and pans, Has a replacable brush heads
features: TOUGH NYLON BRISTLES: This Tala Dishbrush has Tough Natural Fibres and perfect for Deep Cleaning
SHAPE: The shape and design of the Brush head and fibres ensure a strong and deep clean that will lift stubborn bake on debris with ease and a reduce level of soap cleaning
CHANGEABLE HEADS: This dish brush has a removeable and replaceable head which means the head can be removed for cleaning or changing, making this a sustainable choice
NON-SCRATCH: This Dish brush is perfect for cleaning all types of kitchenware and will not scratch or damage Cookware and Bakeware items

TALA: The Tala collection of Kitchen gadgets and utensils includes a diverse which is perfect for everyday cooking and baking, established in 1899, Tala has become a trusted source of high-quality Kitchenware, Bakeware and Cookware
description: Product Description Tala Dish Brush has comfortable wooden construction. It features tough nylon bristles, removable head for other cleaning jobs. Come with hanging hook for easy storage. It measures 24cm head length by 7cm diameter and available in cream colour. Weighs 77 grams. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use. Box Contains 1x Dish Brush See more
